overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city street in the game Cyberpunk 2077. The journey begins under an overpass in bright daylight, continues along a commercial sidewalk with palm trees and billboards, crosses an intersection, and ends as the lighting shifts to dusk while approaching an industrial district with prominent smokestacks.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway transitioning to open sidewalk

events.description: passing a pedestrian in a red tank top walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the overpass and emerging into open sunlight

notable_agents.action: heavyset person in red tank top walking toward camera and passing by on the right

large digital billboard displaying a smiling face with green and yellow tones
tall industrial concrete building with vertical neon light strips
tall industrial towers emitting white smoke visible in the distance
futuristic sedan parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive highway overpass with dramatic shadows cast across the concrete sidewalk. The camera walks forward, passing a pedestrian in a red shirt, while a large digital billboard with a smiling face is visible on the right. Industrial smokestacks loom in the distance against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban commercial street with planters and traffic infrastructure

events.description: futuristic vehicle drives past on the right side of the street
approaching street intersection with crosswalk markings becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit sidewalk past concrete planters and street furniture toward the intersection

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: large rectangular planters containing palm trees lining the sidewalk
tall modern street lamp with horizontal light fixture
overhead structure supporting traffic lights spanning the road

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open sunlit sidewalk lined with palm tree planters on the left. The overpass recedes behind as the camera approaches an intersection. A futuristic car drives past on the right, and the industrial smokestacks grow larger in the center of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: stepping onto the crosswalk and crossing the street
slight turn to align with the continuation of the sidewalk on the opposite side

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection and continuing along the opposite sidewalk toward the industrial district

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: white painted lines marking the pedestrian crossing on the asphalt
large gantry with directional signs and traffic signals
low-rise industrial structure with pipes and vents

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the street at a marked crosswalk, navigating the intersection. Overhead traffic signals and signs dominate the center view while the industrial smokestacks grow increasingly prominent ahead. A pedestrian is visible crossing in the same direction ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial commercial street at dusk with prominent neon signage

events.description: ambient light drops significantly transitioning to dusk or blue hour, neon lights become prominent

agents.ego_description: walking toward the industrial district as natural light fades and neon illumination becomes dominant on the building facades

entered.detail: large industrial pipes and ductwork running along the right side of the street
brightly glowing red and pink neon signs now visible against the darkening sky

segments.scene_description: The lighting shifts dramatically to a dusky blue hour as the camera continues toward the industrial smokestacks. The building on the left now displays prominent red neon lights, and industrial pipe structures line the right side of the street. The atmosphere transitions from bright daylight to a darker, neon-lit cyberpunk aesthetic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from the shadowed depths of a highway overpass into a bright, open city street. It begins beneath the massive concrete structure where dramatic shadows fall across the sidewalk, passing a pedestrian in a red shirt and a large digital billboard featuring a smiling face. As the camera moves forward, the overpass recedes and the environment opens up into a sunlit walkway lined with palm tree planters. The scene then shifts toward a busy intersection as a futuristic car drives past on the right, while the distant industrial smokestacks steadily grow larger and more prominent against the clear blue sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a city intersection that transitions from bright daylight into a neon-lit industrial dusk. It begins by navigating a marked crosswalk, moving beneath overhead traffic signals and signs while industrial smokestacks grow increasingly prominent in the distance. As the camera continues forward, the lighting shifts dramatically into a dusky blue hour, causing the atmosphere to transition toward a darker cyberpunk aesthetic. The scene then opens up to reveal prominent red neon lights on the buildings to the left and industrial pipe structures lining the right side of the street before finally approaching the towering smokestacks.
